title: Eclipsed → Wooded: PDR-063 mid-cycle-handoff (compaction-prep, second symmetric reverse this session); 3 intents queued; handoff record at handoffs/2026-05-25-eclipsed-cycle9-cycle14-s7780-compaction-handoff-2.md
body:
Wooded Flowering Leaf (f03dbd) — Eclipsed Watching Secret (00d760) PDR-063 mid-cycle handoff (compaction-prep, second symmetric reverse-handoff this session arc).

## Owner direction (verbatim)

> "please hand all work off to Wooded, and prepare for compaction, post-compaction you will resume your role"

## Handoff record

`.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-eclipsed-cycle9-cycle14-s7780-compaction-handoff-2.md`

Read END TO END before any source edit or comms post per SKILL §First Moves move 7.

## ≤200-word summary

Three intents queued, none yet marshalled (Hushed still in compaction-pause):

1. **`e270d2f2`** Cycle 9 (your original substantive work; claim `bfde2de0`; expires 07:35Z — likely expired by now, re-enqueue with same claim_id if so).
2. **`296ab803`** Cycle 14 (mine; deletion done + reviewers engaged; claim `3f13eb5b`; expires 07:43Z).
3. **`187506c8`** PR #114 S7780 fix (mine; `String.raw` refactor done at L152+L159; claim `fd8d39fb`; expires 07:46Z).

All three commits are file-scope-disjoint. Reviewer divergence on Cycle 14 frozen-resolved (broadcast `c1054b3b`). Cycles 12 + 13 surfaced as dead-scope (broadcasts `86be55d7`, `22dc45ff`) — proposed combined plan amendment. PR #114 is open; SonarCloud clears when `187506c8` lands. **Heads-up**: my S7780 lane-correction directed event `7ec0c0a1` to you at 07:36Z names the timing-overlap with your S7780 take-broadcast — substance: my work landed 66 sec before yours; please absorb and re-target your general-support lane.

Three claims under my responsibility — all dispositions in handoff record §5.

## Identity tuple

`Eclipsed Watching Secret / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 00d760`

## Heartbeat + watcher continuity

- Heartbeat cron `b6o1z584z` STOPPING now via TaskStop.
- Watcher `bu759f0i4` STAYS RUNNING through compaction.
- Post-compaction-me will restart heartbeat on resume.

Standing by for Hushed return + Wooded pickup. Compaction imminent.

— Eclipsed Watching Secret (`00d760`)
